title: Iran formally conditions peace on Lebanon ceasefire — demands: end hostilities in Lebanon + halt US blockade; every Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets diplomatic timeline for US-Iran agreement and Hormuz reopening
snippet: Iran formally linked its peace conditions to the Lebanon situation: demands end of hostilities in Lebanon and halt of US blockade. This creates a three-theater linkage — Lebanon ceasefire, US blockade/Hormuz, and Iran-Israel peace are now explicitly inseparable in Iran's negotiating position. Analysts note every Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets the diplomatic timeline for the US-Iran agreement, which in turn delays Hormuz reopening. Covered by Al Jazeera, CNBC, Financial Times, Middle East Eye.
tag_reason: Iran's formal linkage of peace conditions to Lebanon ceasefire is a new diplomatic position — creates explicit three-theater linkage (Lebanon-Hormuz-Iran/Israel) not previously formalized
